appError.title: Failed to initialize app
appError.clearDatabaseDescription: Unfortunately, the local database encountered an error while being migrated to the latest version of this app. Deleting your local data will resolve the issue but you will permanently lose your settings and chat history. This action cannot be undone.

upgradeRequired.title: Update required
upgradeRequired.description: This version of Thunderbolt is no longer supported. Update the app to keep chatting and syncing.

storageUnavailable.title: Storage is disabled
storageUnavailable.description: Thunderbolt needs browser storage (IndexedDB) to work, but it's currently disabled.
storageUnavailable.lockdownHint: If you are using iOS Lockdown Mode, exclude Thunderbolt from the "Configure Web Browsing" setting, then reopen the app.
storageUnavailable.genericHint: This can happen in private windows or when site data is blocked. Enable storage for this site and reload.

pendingDevice.title: New device waiting
pendingDevice.description: A new device is requesting access to your encrypted data.

revokedDevice.title: Device access revoked
revokedDevice.description: This device has been signed out remotely. Choose what to do with your local data.
revokedDevice.keepDescription: Your chats and settings will remain on this device for offline use.
revokedDevice.deleteDescription: Remove all chats, settings, and cached data from this device.

approveDevice.title: Approve this device?
approveDevice.description: This will share your encryption key with the device, allowing it to decrypt and sync your data.

revokeDevice.trustedDescription: The device will be signed out and its local data will be cleared on next sync. This device will need to sign in again to use sync.
revokeDevice.pendingDescription: This will deny the device access to your encrypted data. The device will need to set up sync again.

syncSetup.introDescription: Keep your data in sync across all your devices. Everything is encrypted end-to-end — only your devices can read your data.
syncSetup.detectingDescription: Registering this device and detecting your account status.
syncSetup.firstDeviceDescription: This is the first device on your account. We'll create an encryption key to protect your data and give you a recovery key to keep safe.
syncSetup.firstDeviceWarning: Please store your recovery key somewhere safe — you'll need it to access your data if you ever lose all your devices.
syncSetup.deniedDescription: Your request to sync this device was denied by another device. You can try again or close this dialog.
syncSetup.completeDescription: This device has been approved and sync is now enabled across your devices.
syncSetup.approvalDescription: Open Thunderbolt on one of your trusted devices and go to Settings → Devices to approve this device.
syncSetup.recoveryEntryDescription: Enter the 24-word recovery phrase you saved when you first set up sync.
syncSetup.recoveryDisplayDescription: Write down these 24 words in order and store them somewhere safe. You'll need them to recover your data if you lose access to all your devices. This phrase won't be shown again.
syncSetup.clipboardUnavailable: Clipboard unavailable. Please select the phrase above and copy it manually.
syncSetup.confirmSaved: I have saved my recovery phrase

contextOverflow.title: Context Window Exceeded
contextOverflow.description: Your message would exceed the model's {{maxTokens}}-token context window.

logout.title: Log out
logout.description: What would you like to do with your local data?
logout.keepDescription: Your chats and settings will remain on this device for next time.
logout.deleteDescription: Remove all chats, settings, and cached data from this device.

syncStatus.willSyncWhenOnline: Changes will sync when back online
syncStatus.cloudSyncDescription: Keep all of your devices synced.
syncStatus.cloudSyncEnabledDescription: Enable cloud synchronization to keep your data synced across devices.

syncEnableWarning.title: Enable sync?
syncEnableWarning.description: At this time, synced data is not encrypted. Enabling sync will store your data on our servers without encryption. Do you want to continue?

telemetryRequired.title: Telemetry Required
telemetryRequired.description: In order to use preview features, we ask that you help us improve the product by sharing telemetry data.

telemetryWarning.title: Preview Features Will Be Disabled
telemetryWarning.description: Turning off telemetry will disable all preview features. Are you sure you want to continue?
